package rulefixtures

import (
	"hash/crc32"
)

// scenario for crc32_checksum_in_loop: `crc32.Checksum...` inside loops.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario473Positive(chunks [][]byte) uint32 {
	var total uint32
	for _, payload := range chunks {
		total += crc32.ChecksumIEEE(payload)
	}
	return total
}
